exercises.title: Complete the sentences with the words in the box.

sentences.text: Be careful on your bicycle today. It’s very cold and the water on the road is solid _____.
The desert is hot and very _____ because there isn’t much rain.
There are _____ in many areas this morning, so take your umbrellas.
We’re stopping our hockey match because a _____ is coming. Look, the sky is black!
Temperatures are below _____ in many parts of the country, with snow in some places.
There’s a lot of rain in the north today. The _____ weather is good for plants but not for people who want to go outside.
